case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CEJA, JUAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $758.74 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CEJA, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CEJA, JUAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CEJA, JUAN $758.24 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $783.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-26-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-28-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
